event.title: FSFE Berlin local group meeting in Berlin, Germany

body.p: The Berlin group of FSFE supporters is meeting at Kieztreff Undine (Hagenstraße 57 Berlin (S/U Bhf Lichtenberg)) to prepare the events for the rest of the year and chat about current Free Software related topics. The meeting will start at 18h in Berlin, the main language spoken will likely be German.
